posts.content: 我在乌尔姆出生——说话很晚，却在安静的谜题里比在喧闹的课堂更自在。
posts.translation: I was born in Ulm—I spoke late, yet was more at home with quiet puzzles than noisy classrooms.

posts.content: 奇迹年里我把论文接连抛出：布朗运动、光量子、狭义相对论——我想说，直觉里的时空并不牢靠。
posts.translation: In my miracle year I threw paper after paper—Brownian motion, light quanta, special relativity—I meant to say intuition lies about space and time.

posts.content: 我把广义相对论写完：引力成了几何。我愿方程简洁，却让自然保留一切复杂。
posts.translation: I finished general relativity—gravity became geometry. I wanted simple equations; nature keeps her complexity.

posts.content: 我在普林斯顿离去。过去、现在与未来的划分于我而言，不过是顽固的幻觉——可我仍感激这一生追问。
posts.translation: I slipped away in Princeton. Past, present, future—only a stubborn illusion, I said—yet I am grateful for the asking.
